summary: Iteration 81 - Paddy Stock Fix & Individual Voucher PDF Print. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified. FIXED: Route order issue for /purchase-book/export/pdf (was being intercepted by /{voucher_id}/pdf).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paddy stock now shows 297Q correctly (was 461.96Q bug). Single voucher PDF endpoints work at /api/sale-book/{id}/pdf and /api/purchase-book/{id}/pdf. Bulk PDF exports at /export/pdf also working. Route ordering fixed in purchase_vouchers.py (dynamic {voucher_id}/pdf route must come AFTER static /export/pdf route).

details: Paddy stock now shows 297Q (NOT 461.96Q)
Fixed calculation: qntl - bag/100 - p_pkt_cut/100 - paddy_input_qntl
Consistent with /api/paddy-stock API
available_paddy_qntl matches stock-items Paddy value
Both APIs return ~297Q
Returns valid PDF for existing voucher
Returns 404 for invalid voucher ID
Content-Disposition header includes sale_invoice filename
Returns valid PDF for existing voucher
Returns 404 for invalid voucher ID
Content-Disposition header includes purchase_voucher filename
Both bulk export endpoints still working
Route ordering fixed - /export/pdf must come before /{voucher_id}/pdf
Printer icon button visible in each voucher row
2 print buttons found for 2 sale vouchers
Clicking opens PDF in new tab via /api/sale-book/{id}/pdf
Printer icon button visible in each voucher row
1 print button found for 1 purchase voucher
Clicking opens PDF in new tab via /api/purchase-book/{id}/pdf
Paddy shows 297 Q (CORRECT - not 461.96Q)
All other stock items displayed correctly
Stock cards have color coding for quantities

bug_fix_applied.root_cause: The dynamic route /purchase-book/{voucher_id}/pdf was defined BEFORE the static route /purchase-book/export/pdf, causing 'export' to be matched as a voucher_id
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved the single voucher PDF route definition to after the bulk export routes
bug_fix_applied.verification: Bulk PDF export now returns 200 with valid PDF content

test_classes: TestPaddyStockCalculation (2 tests) - stock-items Paddy value and API consistency
TestSingleVoucherPDF (4 tests) - sale and purchase single PDF endpoints + 404 handling
TestBulkPDFExports (2 tests) - sale-book and purchase-book bulk PDF exports

screenshots: .screenshots/sale_book_view.png - Sale Vouchers with print buttons visible

verification_notes.paddy_stock_bug_resolved: User reported Paddy showing 461.96Q instead of 297Q. Now correctly shows ~297Q in both stock-items and paddy-stock APIs
verification_notes.individual_pdf_print: Both Sale and Purchase voucher tables have Printer icon button for each row. Clicking opens PDF in new browser tab
verification_notes.route_ordering_importance: In FastAPI, route definition order matters. Static paths (/export/pdf) must be defined BEFORE dynamic paths (/{id}/pdf) to avoid matching conflicts
